summary: Enterprise CVE Management Platform Phase 5 - Notifications & Reporting complete testing. All 22/22 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI elements verified working. Email sending via Resend API functional.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/cve/notifications - List notifications with pagination and type/unread filters working
GET /api/cve/notifications/unread-count - Returns unread count and breakdown by type
POST /api/cve/notifications - Create notification with all types supported
PUT /api/cve/notifications/read-all - Mark all notifications as read (returns count marked)
POST /api/cve/notifications/check-sla - SLA compliance check returns checked/warnings/breaches counts
GET /api/cve/notifications/preferences - Returns email_enabled, email_recipient, email_types, sla_warning_threshold
POST /api/cve/notifications/test-email - Resend API integration working, email sent successfully
POST /api/cve/notifications/weekly-digest - Returns comprehensive digest with period, new_cves, fixed_cves, open_cves, critical_open, sla_warnings, sla_breaches
GET /api/cve/reports/cves/csv - CSV export with proper headers and Content-Type
GET /api/cve/reports/governance/csv - Governance report CSV export working
seed_data_creation: Multiple test notifications created during testing and cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 Notifications & Reporting complete. All notification endpoints tested. Resend email integration verified working (test email sent successfully with email_id). Weekly digest generates comprehensive stats. CSV exports working for CVEs and governance reports. All frontend UI elements including Check SLA, Weekly Digest, Test Email, Preferences buttons, Export CSV buttons, type filter dropdown, and unread toggle are functional.

backend_tests.GET /api/cve/notifications/unread-count: PASS - Returns unread count with by_type breakdown
backend_tests.PUT /api/cve/notifications/read-all: PASS - Mark all read with count

frontend_tests.Check SLA button: PASS - Displays SLA Check Result panel
frontend_tests.Weekly Digest button: PASS - Displays digest panel with stats
frontend_tests.Preferences button: PASS - Opens preferences panel with email toggle and type toggles
frontend_tests.Notification bell in header: PASS - data-testid present, shows unread badge

resend_email_integration.note: Resend API key configured in backend/.env as RESEND_API_KEY
